items.title: Panic buying shuts 421 petrol bunks in Andhra Pradesh; CM Naidu orders review
items.summary: Panic buying pushed Andhra Pradesh’s petrol and diesel sales 50% above the daily average on Saturday, shutting 421 of 4,510 outlets
